name: Dare to Live
overview: A music-infused docuseries in which Rory Kramer takes his artist friends (Justin Bieber, Steve Aoki, Iggy Azalea, The Chainsmokers and More) to the farthest reaches of their comfort zones and across the globe.

trailers.title: Dare to Live: A New Series ft. Justin Bieber, Iggy Azalea & More | Official Teaser  | MTV
